Person.description: Encapsulates the bare details of a person

id.description: Primary ID (Employee ID, User ID etc.) of person

BulkDeleteActionRequest.description: Encapsulates a bulk delete action request

items.description:
The task identifiers of the tasks to delete. All tasks specified in the
payload will be deleted. This operation either succeeds as a whole or
fails at a whole. If any of the tasks does not exist or is inaccessible,
the entire operation will fail.

BulkUpdateActionRequest.description: Encapsulates a bulk update action request

update_contexts.description:
Whether to update contexts from the payload. If set to true, the
`contexts` property must be set in the payload.

update_escalation_dates.description:
Whether to update escalation dates from the payload. If set to true, the
`escalation_dates` property must be set in the payload.

update_extensions.description:
Whether to update extensions from the payload. If set to true, the
`extensions` property must be set in the payload.

update_tags.description:
Whether to update tags from the payload. If set to true, the `tags`
property must be set in the payload.

items.description:
The tasks to update. All tasks specified in the payload will be updated.
This operation either succeeds as a whole or fails at a whole. If any of
the tasks does not exist or is inaccessible, the entire operation will
fail. Use the task identifiers as keys in the dictionary, and the full
task payload as values.

BulkUpdateActionResponse.description: Encapsulates a bulk update action response

items.description:
The first 100 tasks that were updated. The task identifiers are the keys
in the dictionary, and the full task payload are sent as values.

BulkUpdateStatusActionRequest.description: Encapsulates a bulk update status action request

items.description:
The task identifiers and status to update. All tasks specified in the
payload will be updated. This operation either succeeds as a whole or
fails at a whole. If any of the tasks does not exist or is inaccessible,
the entire operation will fail. Use the task identifiers as keys in the
dictionary, and the status as values.

BulkUpdatePatchActionRequest.description: Encapsulates a bulk update patch action request

items.description:
The tasks to update. All tasks specified in the payload will be updated.
This operation either succeeds as a whole or fails at a whole. If any of
the tasks does not exist or is inaccessible, the entire operation will
fail. Use the task identifiers as keys in the dictionary, and the patch
data structure in the values.

task_id.description: The task identifier of the task to clone.

name.description: The name of the cloned task. If not provided, the name of the original task  will be used.

NamedEntity.description: Encapsulates an entity that has a name, but is not a person.

Priority.description: Priority of a Task or Sub Task

Status.description: Status of a Task or Sub Task

SubTask.description:
Tasks can have 0 or more sub tasks. Progress on a parent task is tracked by
reviewing the status of sub tasks.
SubTask.title: Sub Task

due_at.description: When the sub task is due.

details.example:
- Validate results.
- Update most recent chart with new results.

created_at.description: When the sub task was created

updated_at.description: When the task was most recently updated.

SubTaskPatchRequest.description:
Request body for patching a sub task. The request contains one or more fields to update in a sub task. The fields are optional, but at least one field must be provided.
It should also be noted that there is a difference between providing a value of `null` for a field and not providing a field. When a field is not in the payload, it is ignored and the sub task will retain its current value. If a field is set to `null`, the value will be blanked out in the sub task object.
SubTaskPatchRequest.title: Sub Task Patch Request

name.description: Free-form name of the task as entered by the user.

details.example:
Check Blood Pressure and Heart Rate.
Recent readings were out of range.
If readings are out of range again, alert nursing staff.
details.description: Free text entered by user to provide more detail.

updated_at.description: When the comment was most recently updated.

TaskContext.description: Context to which a task applies.
TaskContext.title: Task Context

type.description:
Type of the context. Domain services define their contexts and provide
instructions on how to connect to them through the component registry.

deep_link.description:
Deep link to the context. Domain services define their deep links and
provide instructions on how to connect to them through the component
registry.

is_visible.description:
Indicates whether the context is visible. If set to False, the context
will not be displayed in the frontend.

props.description:
Contents are context-dependent. Has the most important fields from a context.
For examples, a Client context may contain `first_name` and `last_name`.
Depending on the context type, this field may be two-way.

field_label.description:
Label of the extension. The label is used as the title of the extension
when rendered.

field_value.description: Value. The type is dependent on the extension type.

TaskExtensionSchema.description: Schema for custom defined extension field
TaskExtensionSchema.title: Task Extension Schema

label.description:
Label of the extension. The label is used as the title of the extension
when rendered.

instructions.example: Enter the health care number of the patient

rank.description: Rank of the extension. Extensions are rendered in ascending order of rank.

required.description:
Indicates whether the extension is required. If set to True, the extension
must be filled.

settings.description:
Additional settings for the extension. The settings are dependent on the
extension type.

branch.description: Branch to which the task belongs.

name.description: Free-form name of the task as entered by the user.

updated_at.description: Time the task was most recently updated.

updated_by.description: Who most recently updated the Task.

current_priority.description: Current Priority of the Task. This is calculated based on the `initial_priority`, `escalation_dates` and current date/time.

assigned_to_user.description: Person to whom the task is assigned.

assigned_to_group.description: Group to which the task is assigned.

custom_icon.description: Custom icon to be displayed for the task.

status_at.description: Time the task status was most recently updated.

status_by.description: Who most recently updated the status of the Task.

details.example:
Check Blood Pressure and Heart Rate.
Recent readings were out of range.
If readings are out of range again, alert nursing staff.
details.description: Free text entered by user to provide more detail.

notify_at.description:
Time the assignee(s) should be notified. Assignee(s) will not be notified
if blank.

has_comments.description: Indicates whether comments have been added to the task.

has_sub_tasks.description: Indicates whether sub tasks have been created.

extensions_schema.description: Schema for custom defined extension fields

TaskPatchRequest.description:
Request body for patching a task. The request contains one or more fields to update in a task. The fields are optional, but at least one field must be provided.
It should also be noted that there is a difference between providing a value of `null` for a field and not providing a field. When a field is not in the payload, it is ignored and the task will retain its current value. If a field is set to `null`, the value will be blanked out in the task object.
TaskPatchRequest.title: Task Patch Request

name.description: Free-form name of the task as entered by the user.

assigned_to_user.description: Person to whom the task is assigned.

assigned_to_group.description: Group to which the task is assigned.

custom_icon.description: Custom icon to be displayed for the task.

initial_priority.description:
Reset the initial priority. if there are `escalation_dates` defined, then the `current_priority` may
be immediately different from the `initial_priority`.

details.example:
Check Blood Pressure and Heart Rate.
Recent readings were out of range.
If readings are out of range again, alert nursing staff.
details.description: Free text entered by user to provide more detail.

notify_at.description:
Time the assignee(s) should be notified. Assignee(s) will not be notified
if blank.

page_size.description: Number of items per page requested

total_count.description:
Total number of items available. Only returned if `include_total_pages` is
set to true. Not supported on all resources.

total_pages.description:
Total number of pages. Only returned if `include_total_pages` is set to
true. Not supported on all resources.
